# MetaClean
> Remove metadata from photos, PDFs, and text files. Free, private, client-side.

## Tools
- Photo Metadata Remover: Remove EXIF, GPS, camera info from photos
- PDF Metadata Remover: Remove author, title, keywords from PDFs
- Text File Cleaner: Remove BOM, hidden Unicode from text files
- EXIF Viewer: Inspect all metadata in photos
- GPS Remover: Remove location data from photos
- Social Media Cleaner: Clean photos before posting
- Batch Remover: Clean multiple files at once
- Privacy Score: Calculate privacy risk score

## Privacy
All processing happens in the browser. Files never leave your device.
